target: 16. Last Night
You'll catch a cold.

Hizuru-kun's body is being kept underground.
Her parents haven't been contacted yet…
It's not ready yet.

…She was apparently a famous novelist.
If she died, it would become big news nationwide.
The media will flood the island.

There's no way to hide her chest wound.
It clearly looks like a murder victim.

No need to hide it. This is murder.
The culprit's already known.
But just give me one more day, okay?
Ah… I understand…
Thank you.

Huh?
Ah… sorry… I got carried away…
This is hard to talk about.

Ah, by the way.
About that thing where there are two Shides…
He's been switching bodies for over 300 years.

If he ever died or got seriously injured,
it wouldn't be strange to have a backup body.
So… Heine had multiple children?

No… that's not it.
Shide was keeping his previous bodies "stored"…

But they were all burned in the war.
My father told me that once…
The body in those photos… is still there!?

That's right. His previous body,
Karakiri was killed 40 years ago… after the war.

At first I thought it was narcissism,
but if that body could move, it would be useful as a backup.
No idea how he's keeping them or making them move.
<color=#GF_TIPS_084>Sub-account</color>…?

Professor Hishigata.
Cover your ears… please.
What?
…It fell into the sea.

Why did you know it would fall?!
<color=#GF_KEY_2SECOND>How?</color>

(I knew in advance it would fall…
This is Ryunosuke's premonition ability…)

(Thank you… 
Ryunosuke-san, Nagumo-sensei)

(Besides Ushio,
we lost Ryunosuke… and Roz too…)

(The rifle from Nezu-san, 
the copied shotgun Ushio had, the pistol… they're all gone)

Shide is still alive…
What do we do?
Can we even win on our own…?
That's what I wanted to say.
Mio?
What's in your pocket, Shinpei?

Ah… this…
It's a shell necklace. From Ushio.

No response even when I called out,
so probably… it's just a fragment of Ushio…

Exactly.
That's why Heine ran away.
Huh…?

It's not that there's no reaction, Shinpei.
We shadows figured it out. 
She was really angry…
My sister.

Sister is here now.
All of your memories are in this shell.

Just before disappearing, 
she managed to transfer her memory into the shell…
But without a body… she can't move.

(Ushio's memories are in this shell…
That's why Heine misunderstood and thought Ushio was still alive…)

So that's why Heine retreated at Mt. Takanosu…
It must have been because of Ushio.

Even as just memories, 
you protected her Shinpei…

What about this shell's memory?
Did you scan it!?

Impossible.
It can't be read by other shadows. 
Like my mother…

Maybe she did it to prevent the enemy from getting her data.
Only your sister can read that file. 
But your sister is already…
Wait…!
She's coming back.
What!?

That's right!! Tomorrow!!
During the festival on the 24th, 
when fireworks go off… at that beach…
The first one who doesn't know anything yet will come back!!

Oh! I get it!! 
If we scan this shell with your sister tomorrow!

Ah!!
That's definitely it!!!
Which is why she left this behind…
Ushio… will revive!
Shinpei.

The rain has stopped.
What are you doing?
Just practicing.
Practicing?
Ah. Just a little.
(In two seconds, I need to be able to predict freely)

Oh… you remember?
What I said this morning before leaving.

If I come back safely, there's something to tell…
Right?

Yeah.
Tomorrow… will your sister really be coming back?
Ushio wouldn't have put her data in a shell without reason.

Before disappearing, she scanned Shide…
She must've found something.
It's a gamble but the possibility is there…!!
You look like you've come up with another good plan.

Maybe… I'll tell everyone later. 
Is that it?

Huh?…
Yeah, sure.
Hey… Shinpei!

You said you had something to tell me…
What's that?
…Well, how do I say this…
I like you.

…What?…
I really, truly like Shinpei-kun!
"Uhh… yeah…"
"…Sorry."
Uhh… yeah…
That's all?
No… thank you…
Did you already know?
…Uhh…

Ah! It's not like that!
Don't take it the wrong way, okay?
It was just… I wanted to say something…

If we die tomorrow,
I don't want to leave without telling you this feeling.
<color=#GF_TIPS_112>This emotion</color>

So… I just wanted to say it.
!!!
Oh…
Yeah.
Sorry, Mio.

I can't return your feelings…
You're my important little sister.
Oh… right…

Ah! I feel so much better now!!!
Even if we die, there'll be no regrets!
Sorry… Mio.
Your feelings… I can't return them.
I love Ushio…
Yeah.
You're my important little sister.
Yeah…

Thank you… 
You told me properly.
Mio…

Ah! I feel so much better now!!!
Even if we die, there'll be no regrets!

Wait, Mio!
Don't say anything more.
That's all I can take…
Huh…?

Sorry…
Your courage is so clear to me,
it hurts.
That's why I can't ask you anymore.

Shinpei…
But tomorrow is…

Live on and overcome tomorrow.
All I can think about right now is that.

…If you say it like that…
There's nothing I can do but comply.
I'm sorry…

…Heh.
Okay, I get it…

Shin-chan…
Let's try our best tomorrow!
…Yeah.

(No matter what happens tomorrow…
Everything will be decided on July 24th!)
